Syntheticroutesofpurinebenzimidazoles2–4.Reagentsandconditions:(i)morpholine,80(cid:3)C;(ii)benzimidazoles8a–f,potassiumcarbonate,dimethylfor- mamide,50(cid:3)C;(iii)benzimidazoles10a–i,potassiumcarbonate,dimethylformamide,r.t.;(iv)benzimidazoles12a–g,potassiumcarbonate,dimethylformamide,r.t.. developedasantiS.aureusagent.However,theallylandpropargyl derivatives3h–ididnotdisplayobviouseffectsonsuppressingthe growthofbacteria,whichindicatedthattheunsaturatedaliphatic chainwasnotpropitioustoexertinhibitorypotency. Amongphenylones,fluorobenzylderivatives4b,4dand4falso gave equivalent or even lower inhibitory concentrations than chlorobenzylones4c,4eand4gtowardsS.aureusATCC29213,P. aeruginosa and P. aeruginosa ATCC27853, which implied that fluorine atom on the benzyl moieties exerted positive effect on microbial inhibition.
